outcome: grid exit 0; single pod warm-reuse engaged for swap cells

acceptance_evidence.cells_1_and_2_swap_wall_time_gt_0: FAIL on literal — sidecar reports 0.0 for all 3 cells. Captured as orchestrator instrumentation gap; cell-1 + cell-2 mp4s timestamped 35s and 37s after cell-0, so swap+gen wall ~30s each (vs ~10min cold-boot).

warm_reuse_observation: Single pod served all 3 cells in 77s total group wall time (cell 0 → cell 1 in 35s, cell 1 → cell 2 in 37s). Validates the /lora/set_stack swap path end-to-end.
